name: Escargot and Spinach Traume
recipeIngredient: 1 package Fresh spinach, cleaned and trimmed
12 large Romaine lettuce leaves with ends snipped
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until transparent over medium flame.
2. Add pine nuts, garlic; saute for 1 minute.
3. Add spinach; saute until limp. Add escargot and remaining ingredients. Saute for 1 minute. Remove from heat. Chill.
4. Bring water and oil to boil. Add romaine lettuce and cook until limp. Remove from water. Chill.
5. Take one romaine lettuce leaf and lay flat on the counter. Divide spinach and escargot into 6 equal portions.
6. Place one portion in the middle of the romaine lettuce leaf. Fold ends over to create a golf-ball-size portion.
7. Place in baking dish. Heat in 350°F oven.
8. Top with Orange Garlic Butter.
